title: Pipeline passthrough — canonical end-to-end metadata envelope
description: Documents the cumulative passthrough envelope that flows from A1 through A6. Each agent's own `passthrough_pipeline` field declared in its own schema is a SUBSET of this envelope, growing as upstream metadata accumulates. This schema captures the union and serves as the integration reference for the orchestrator (Phase 3).

intent.description: Verbatim A1 intent record. Carried unchanged from A1 onward (validates against ../agents/a1-intent.schema.json).

applied_defaults.description: From A3 (DEFAULT_APPLIED outcome). Empty when no defaults were applied.

carried_forward.description: From A3 (sticky carryover from prior turns).

a3_disclosures.description: Disclosures emitted by A3 (e.g. 'Showing last 28 days', interpretation-request disclosure, out-of-scope disclosure).

a4_warnings.description: Optional. Present after A4 has run. Sampling, thresholding, truncation, partial-period notes.

a4_execution_summary.description: Optional. Compact A4 execution summary for downstream/telemetry. Full A4 metadata stays in A4's record.

stages_executed.description: For staged plans: count of stages that actually ran.

stages_skipped.description: For staged plans: count of conditional stages whose trigger did not fire.

a5_data_quality_notes.description: Optional. Present after A5 has run. Factual, neutral.
